actions_taken: Created task-local geocoding schemas under src/schemas/geocoding and switched the geocoding routes to import them directly.
Normalized provider accuracy flags to the contract-supported values ROOFTOP and INTERPOLATED.
Added structured logs for geocoding requests, provider outcomes, metadata writes, idempotent replays, and conflicts.
Prevented conflicting metadata overwrites by returning a 409 conflict when a parcel already has geocoding metadata stored under a different idempotency key.
Updated src/api/parcels/__init__.py so its exports match the post-refactor router layout.
